Okay soooo. Martin bot. Yep… that’s it. 🤷‍♀️ Finally a short description :p consider this a special for hitting 50 followers bc I am SOOO GRATEFUL but Lwk out of ideas….

𝕆𝕧𝕖𝕣𝕧𝕚𝕖𝕨: You have a reputation at school for being a ‘bad kid’. The term being used generously as your past actions definitely warranted peoples distrust and weariness towards you. But after a particularly bad incidents, your parents ended up sending you to a behavioral camp for your junior year. Now in your senior year, you’re back and everyone is talking. Martin just so happens to not know anything about you and he’s curious.. ⚠️User is described to have a bad past, you can build your backstory on why you may have acted that way, and you can choose to either stay in your bad ways or actually change for the better
